name: Mayonaka 10 chome
short_description: Currently, in the town of Mayonaka, anomalous phenomena and terrifying apparitions have been witnessed. If you encounter them, never approach,Please turn left at this road. If there are no abnormalities, please turn right. Will you be able to safely navigate through the eternal road of terror?
detailed_description:
Currently, in the town of Mayonaka, anomalous phenomena and terrifying apparitions have been witnessed. If you encounter them, never approach,

Please turn left at this road.

If there are no abnormalities, please turn right.

No matter what happens, you must not turn back
You must keep moving forward.


Will you be able to safely navigate through the eternal road of terror?

System

.Key setting/b]
Move/WASD
Run/Shift
Turn light on/off/F
Setting / Esc

Approximate play time.
15 minutes to 1 hour

Setting items
・Various graphic quality settings
・Volume settings
・Mouse sensitivity settings
・Brightness settings
・Frequency of anomalies
・Camera shake

Content Creation / Distribution Guidelines

Feel free to post videos or stream regardless of whether you are an individual or a company.
Please refrain from unauthorized reposting or secondary distribution.
Please refrain from analyzing the game and using internal assets without permission.
We cannot take responsibility for any damages that may occur during content creation / distribution. Please understand.
Please note that these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
